content: Connect your own AI service to unlock advanced features in {{productName}}. Once added, it will be accessible to all users in {{aiChats}}.

comment.text: This is a descriptive text appearing below the "AI Providers" heading in the AI Settings. It explains that connecting an AI service enables advanced features for all users, and mentions where these features will be accessible. `{{productName}}` is the brand name of the product (e.g., ONLYOFFICE DocSpace), and `{{aiChats}}` refers to the AI Chats feature.

usage.context:
<div className={styles.aiProvider}>
 <Text
 className={styles.description}
 dataTestId="provider-section-description"
 >
 {t("AISettings:AIProviderSettingDescription", {
 productName: getBrandName("ProductName"),
 aiChats: t("Common:AIChats"),
 })}
 </Text>
 {aiProviderSettingsUrl ? (
